Institutional ownership saw a reduction in the March 2026 quarter.

Business.title: Bharti Airtel fixes record date for its highest-ever dividend of Rs 24/share. What’s the last date to buy?
Business.summary: Bharti Airtel has fixed July 24 as the record date for its highest-ever annual dividend of Rs 24 per share for FY26, making July 23 the last date to buy the stock for eligibility. The announcement comes as brokerages remain bullish on the telecom major's long-term growth and cash flow prospects.

While brokerages remain broadly positive on the long-term outlook, several have cut target prices and earnings estimates, citing near-term execution risks and slower product ramp-up.

Analysts maintain a bullish stance, citing expansion strategies and industry formalisation.

Investors are also awaiting key US inflation data for fresh direction.

Technology.summary: Vivo T5 Lite 5G will launch in India on July 16 at 12:00pm IST. The official teasers show the phone in light blue and black colour options with a dual rear camera unit. It will be available for purchase through Flipkart. It is confirmed to feature a 6,500mAh battery with support for 44W fast charging. It has a MediaTek Dimensity 6300 chipset include military-grade durability.

They also include flexible ear hangers, multiple ear tips, fitting supporters and a cable clip for a secure fit. Priced at $119.99 (roughly Rs. 11,500) in the US…

Technology.title: Oppo Find N7 Leak Hints at Launch Timeline and Presence of 6,500mAh Battery, Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 6 Chip
Technology.summary: Oppo Find N7 will reportedly be launched in the first quarter of 2027. The next-generation foldable is said to be undergoing testing with the 2nm Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 6 (SM8950). It could come with a 6,500mAh battery. The Oppo Find N6 has a 6,000mAh battery with 80W wired and 50W wireless charging support.

Technology.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Becomes Biggest Steam Launch in Series' History
Technology.summary: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced launched on PC, PS5, and Xbox Series S/X on July 9. The game has already become the series' biggest launch on Steam, reaching nearly 100,000 peak concurrent players on the storefront. Black Flag Resynced is a full remake of Assassin's Creed IV: Black Flag.

Developed by Meta Superintelligence Labs, the AI model supports a context window of up to one million tokens. Alongside, Meta also…

Technology.title: Vivo X Fold 6 Reportedly Gets Indonesian SDPPI Approval; May Arrive in Global Markets Soon
Technology.summary: Vivo X Fold 6 has just appeared on an Indonesian certification site, suggesting that the global launch will happen soon. The listing shows the phone with model number V2559. It was launched in China last month with an 8.02-inch AMOLED inner display and a 6.51-inch cover screen. It has IP58 + IP59 ratings for dust and water resistance. The handset runs on a MediaTek Dimensity 9500 Super chipset.

Technology.title: HMD Arc 2 Launched With Unisoc T603 Chip, 5,000mAh Battery: Price, Features
Technology.summary: HMD has reportedly launched the HMD Arc 2 in Thailand as the successor to the HMD Arc from 2024. According to a report, the smartphone is powered by a Unisoc T603 chipset, replacing the older SC9863A. It features a 6.52-inch HD+ 60Hz display, Android 14 Go Edition, up to 128GB storage, a 13-megapixel rear camera and a 5,000mAh battery with 10W charging. The handset is expected to go on sale in Thailand from July 20.

The exemption, valid until 31 March 2029, covers wireless charging parts, displays and lithium-ion cells. The move is expected to improve competitiveness, encourage local manufacturing and battery production, and support India’s electronics…
